text:
Migrate CI pipeline to GitHub Actions

See [migration guide](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/migrating-to-github-actions) and [workflow syntax reference](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/writing-workflows/workflow-syntax-for-github-actions).

Implement JWT refresh token rotation

Track in [issue #241](https://github.com/ferzisdis/backend/issues/241). Spec: [OAuth 2.0 RFC §6](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6749#section-6).

Set up Sentry error tracking for production

Docs: [Sentry Rust SDK](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/rust/).

Investigate memory leak in WebSocket handler

Possibly related to [tokio issue #6434](https://github.com/tokio-rs/tokio/issues/6434). Repro steps in [internal wiki](https://notion.so/team/ws-leak-repro).
Review PR: add cursor-based pagination to /api/tasks
Write integration tests for storage module

Update all dependencies to latest stable

cargo update && cargo audit

This is the [modern workplace](https://www.apa.org/news/podcasts/speaking-of-psychology/attention-spans). González & Mark measured activity switches every 3 minutes. Microsoft reports λ = 30 for heavy collaborators. These researchers are describing millions of people’s actual working conditions. And at these parameters, the math is unambiguous: deep work is statistically near-impossible. Link: https://www.apa.org/news/podcasts/speaking-of-psychology
